source: GENERATED from packages/spec/src/ui/react-blocks.ts — data props from the spec zod schemas, binding/controlled/callback from the React overlay.
note: Props each component accepts in kind:'react' page source. Reference blocks by their PascalCase tag. kind: data=declarative config (from the spec schema) · binding=connects to data · controlled=React state · callback=React function. These blocks are for DATA. Live data: const adapter = useAdapter(); adapter.find/findOne/create/update. STYLING (ADR-0065) — a page's source is runtime metadata, so the console's build-time Tailwind NEVER scans it: utility classNAMES silently produce no CSS. Do NOT use Tailwind className in page source. (a) Layout/chrome: inline style={} with hsl(var(--token)) theme colors — e.g. color:'hsl(var(--foreground))', background:'hsl(var(--card))', border:'1px solid hsl(var(--border))', and px/flex for layout. (b) Overlays: render <ObjectForm formType='drawer'|'modal' open onOpenChange> (a pre-styled Sheet/Dialog) — never hand-roll a fixed inset-0 backdrop.

blocks.summary: Server-connected create/edit/view form for one object. Config props come from the spec FormView schema; bind + wire it with the React props below.

props.name: objectName
props.description: The object this block binds to (server-connected).

props.name: formType
props.description: Form presentation; drawer/modal render the form in a built-in overlay (use drawerSide/drawerWidth/modalSize).

props.name: fields
props.description: Limit/order the fields shown (defaults to the object form fields).

props.name: initialValues
props.description: Prefill values in create mode.

props.name: mode
props.description: Create a new record, or edit/view an existing one — drive from React state.

props.name: recordId
props.description: Which record to load (edit/view). The hook for master/detail.

props.name: onSuccess
props.description: Called after a successful save with the saved record (e.g. close a panel + reload).

props.name: onError
props.description: Called when the save fails.

props.name: onCancel
props.description: Called when the user cancels.

props.name: submitHandler
props.description: Custom persistence instead of the default create/update.

props.name: layout
props.description: Field layout direction

props.name: columns
props.description: Number of columns for the form body

props.name: tabPosition
props.description: Tab strip position (tabbed forms)

props.name: drawerSide
props.description: Drawer side (drawer forms)

props.name: drawerWidth
props.description: Drawer width, e.g. "480px" (drawer forms)

props.name: modalSize
props.description: Modal size (modal forms)

props.name: splitDirection
props.description: Split orientation (split forms)

props.name: subforms
props.description: Inline master-detail child collections

props.name: submitBehavior
props.description: Post-submit behavior

blocks.summary: Server-connected object table with toolbar and switchable visualizations (grid/kanban/calendar/gantt/…). Config props come from the spec ListView schema.

props.name: objectName
props.description: The object this block binds to (server-connected).

props.name: viewType
props.description: Which visualization to render (default grid). How you get a kanban/calendar/gantt of the object.

props.name: navigation
props.description: What a row click does. Use { mode: "none" } when you handle clicks via onRowClick.

props.name: fields
props.description: Limit/order the columns shown (defaults to the object list fields).

props.name: options
props.description: View-type-specific options bag (kanban/calendar/gantt extras); prefer the typed spec props where they exist.

props.name: filters
props.description: ObjectQL base filter; drive from React state for tabbed/searched lists. ([field, op, value]; ops =, !=, >, <, contains, in; compound: ["and", […], […]]).

props.name: onRowClick
props.description: Called with the clicked row's record — the hook for master/detail.

props.name: onNavigate
props.description: Called for page-level navigation.

props.name: columns
props.description: Fields to display as columns

props.name: searchableFields
props.description: Fields enabled for search

props.name: userFilters
props.description: End-user quick-filter bar: dropdown/toggle fields or tab presets. Omit to let the renderer derive filters from select/boolean fields

props.name: pagination
props.description: Pagination configuration

props.name: grouping
props.description: Group records by one or more fields

props.name: rowHeight
props.description: Row height / density setting

props.name: selection
props.description: Row selection configuration

props.name: rowActions
props.description: Actions available for individual row items

props.name: inlineEdit
props.description: Allow inline editing of records directly in the list view

blocks.summary: Chart over an object’s aggregated data. Config props come from the spec Chart config schema.

props.name: objectName
props.description: The object this block binds to (server-connected).

props.name: aggregate
props.description: Aggregation: function (sum/avg/count) over field, grouped by groupBy.

props.name: data
props.description: Static/precomputed data to chart directly instead of binding via objectName + aggregate.

props.name: filter
props.description: ObjectQL filter scoping the data; drive from React state.

props.name: showLegend
props.description: Display legend

props.name: title
props.description: Chart title

props.name: series
props.description: Defined series configuration

props.name: xAxis
props.description: X-Axis configuration

props.name: yAxis
props.description: Y-Axis configuration (support dual axis)

props.name: colors
props.description: Color palette (string[]) or value→color map ({ value: color })

blocks.summary: Field-detail panel for the bound record. Config props from the spec RecordDetails schema.

props.name: objectName
props.description: The record’s object.

props.name: recordId
props.description: The record to show.

props.name: columns
props.description: Number of columns for field layout (1-4)

props.name: layout
props.description: Layout mode: auto uses object highlightFields, custom uses explicit sections

props.name: sections
props.description: Section IDs to show (required when layout is "custom")

props.name: fields
props.description: Explicit field list to display (optional, overrides highlightFields)

blocks.summary: Highlights panel — a strip of key fields. Config props from the spec RecordHighlights schema.

props.name: objectName
props.description: The record’s object.

props.name: recordId
props.description: The record to summarize.

props.name: fields
props.description: Key fields to highlight (1-7 fields max, typically displayed as prominent cards). Each item may be a bare field name or {name, label?, icon?, type?} for inline…

props.name: layout
props.description: Layout orientation for highlight fields

blocks.summary: Related child records via a lookup. Config props from the spec RecordRelatedList schema.

props.name: objectName
props.description: The parent object.

props.name: recordId
props.description: The parent record.

props.name: relationshipField
props.description: Field on related object that points to this record (e.g., "account_id")

props.name: columns
props.description: Fields to display in the related list

props.name: limit
props.description: Number of records to display initially

props.name: showViewAll
props.description: Show "View All" link to see all related records

props.name: sort
props.description: Sort order for related records

props.name: filter
props.description: Additional filter criteria for related records

props.name: title
props.description: Custom title for the related list

props.name: actions
props.description: Action IDs available for related records

props.name: add
props.description: Add-existing-via-picker config (generic m2m/junction assignment).

blocks.summary: Stage/progress bar driven by a status field. Config props from the spec RecordPath schema.

props.name: objectName
props.description: The record’s object.

props.name: recordId
props.description: The record whose stage to show.

props.name: statusField
props.description: Field name representing the current status/stage

props.name: stages
props.description: Explicit stage definitions (if not using field metadata)

blocks.summary: Escape hatch — render any registered component by type. <Block type="object-kanban" objectName="task" /> etc.

props.name: type
props.description: The registered component type to render.
